mentions.note: CEO Jeff Martin: data centers integrated without significantly raising electricity costs in Texas. Rates stable despite build-out.
Selling majority infrastructure stake to KKR; transitioning to regulated utility + LNG upside; still like but not pure LNG play.
Selling infrastructure majority stake to KKR, raising $10B for utility core; Texas electricity demand 3x national average; $48B capex with only 3% rate increase.
